message:
feat(tui): rebuild issue detail view with rich text rendering and graph metrics

Replace the plain-text issue detail view with a RichText-based renderer
that includes graph metrics (PageRank, betweenness, eigenvector),
dependency visualization (blockers, open blockers, dependents), and
link detection via span.link instead of string matching on
"External: url" patterns. Refactor issue_detail_render_text to produce
structured RichText with semantic styling for headers, metrics strips,
and clickable links (~300 lines added, ~112 removed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
